name: Vortex de Chair
description: Globule charnel massif propulsé par des spasmes dimensionnels. Des visages hurlants émergent et disparaissent à sa surface, émettant un cri psychique continu.
prompt: Massive organic flesh globule propelled by dimensional spasms, screaming faces emerging and sinking into surface, continuous psychic scream waves, purple radiation, cosmic horror grimdark sci-fi
